pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 17-specific libraries are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Bump Spring Boot parent version from 2.3.1.RELEASE to 2.6.2 to support Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.3.x does not support Java 17; upgrading is required to compile and run the application on JDK 17 without classloading or reflection errors.
